name: State Highway & Krishi Corridor Act
description: Construct high-speed state expressways and rural link roads to connect rural mandis with urban trading hubs.

name: Krishi Samman Direct Income Subsidy Bill
description: Provide direct DBT monetary transfers to farming households to offset high diesel and electricity costs.

name: State Trade & Inspector Raj Simplification Act
description: Abolish complex municipal licensing fees and replace them with single-window digital clearances for local MSMEs.

name: Chief Minister’s Rural Health & Basti Clinic Act
description: Fund 500 new primary health sub-centers and free diagnostic clinics across under-served tribal and rural blocks.

name: State Board Model Schools Transformation Act
description: Mandate strict infrastructure benchmarks, digital smartboards, and centralized tracking for all state-run schools.

name: Mega Industrial Corridor & Land Allocation Bill
description: Fast-track land acquisition and offer tax holidays to attract major auto and tech manufacturing hubs to the state.

name: Mukhyamantri Grameen Solar Urja Act
description: Distribute heavily subsidized off-grid solar water pumps to farmers lacking reliable grid electricity.

name: State Digital Village Fiber Network Project
description: Lay underground optic fiber cables to bring high-speed broadband to all Gram Panchayat offices and village centers.

name: Yuva Rozgar Unemployed Stipend Scheme
description: Provide a temporary monthly cash allowance (Bhatta) to registered unemployed graduates undergoing skill training.

name: State Police Force Modernization Bill
description: Procure high-tech surveillance, advanced forensic kits, and tactical vehicles for state law enforcement units.

name: Independent Lokayukta Anti-Corruption Probe Bill
description: Empower the state Lokayukta with absolute judicial authority to directly raid and prosecute high-ranking state ministers.

name: Mandatory E-Tendering & Public Contract Act
description: Enforce strict live online bidding for all state PWD and municipal development contracts exceeding 10 Lakhs.

name: Citizen-Led Lokayukta Empowerment Bill
description: Enable local resident welfare associations and citizen panels to lodge institutional corruption charges directly.

name: Scheduled Castes & Backwards Welfare Allocation Bill
description: Enforce strict budgetary spending allocations and targeted business grants for marginalized communities.

name: State Riverine & Industrial Effluent Control Act
description: Impose hefty criminal fines and cancel factory licenses for industrial units discharging toxic waste into local rivers.

name: Berozgari Bhatta Guarantee Act
description: Demand an institutionalized, legally-backed monthly pension scheme for all educated youth seeking employment.

name: Essential Ration & Fuel Price Regulation Act
description: Force strict price controls on the open-market retail costs of mustard oil, pulses, rice, and life-saving drugs.

name: Panchayati Raj Direct Financial Devolution Bill
description: Bypass state secretariat red tape to transfer rural infrastructure budgets straight into Gram Panchayat bank accounts.

name: Official State Language Administrative Use Act
description: Mandate that all high court filings, local administration directives, and signs strictly prioritize the regional language.

name: Protection of Democratic Protest & Assembly Act
description: Prohibit state police from applying Section 144 or using preventive detentions against peaceful political agitators.
